items.final_wording: Supports recording recent international travel, illness timing, severity, vital-sign and infection-control context, with urgent decisions left to the assessing clinician.

source.title: Post-Travel Evaluation of the Ill Traveler
source.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires UAE communicable-disease and referral adaptation
source.population: Ill recent international travelers, with destination, itinerary, timing, exposure, host, syndrome and incubation-period qualifiers.
source.setting: Initial clinical triage and evaluation after international travel.
source.exclusions: Exact for travel history, exposure, timing, syndrome and initial evaluation documentation. It does not generate a diagnosis, test panel, isolation decision, treatment, referral or urgency classification.

exact_location.heading: Introduction and triage of the ill returned traveler

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording recent international travel, illness timing, severity, vital-sign and infection-control context, with urgent decisions left to the assessing clinician.
